title: Badge Monster
description:
BadgeMonster is an AI-driven skill acceleration platform that helps learners upgrade faster through structured SkillSprints, interactive quizzes, and an autonomous AI mentor. Users gain real-time feedback, validate their skills, and earn verifiable badges.

Already trusted by 180+ users across 8+ countries, BadgeMonster is building a global ecosystem for practical, skill-based learning.

title: Next Lite Auth  - OSS
description:
next-lite-auth is a lightweight, open-source JWT authentication library for modern web apps. It provides a simple and flexible way to implement secure authentication in Next.js applications without heavy dependencies or complex setup.

Built for developers who want speed and control, next-lite-auth makes it easy to handle login, token management, and route protection with minimal code.

title: Gitfolio - Portfolio Builder
description:
GitFolio is a developer portfolio platform that transforms your GitHub profile into a clean, professional portfolio in minutes. It automatically showcases your projects, contributions, and skills—no manual setup required.

Built for simplicity and speed, GitFolio helps developers create a strong online presence and share their work with recruiters effortlessly.
